name: 7-Bank ATM (7-Eleven)
en: In every 7-Eleven — takes foreign Visa/Mastercard/Maestro, 24h, English menu.
de: In jedem 7-Eleven — akzeptiert ausländische Visa/Mastercard/Maestro, 24h, engl. Menü.

name: Japan Post Bank ATM
en: At post offices — also accepts most foreign cards; wide coverage.
de: In Postämtern — akzeptiert ebenfalls die meisten ausländischen Karten; große Abdeckung.

name: AEON Bank ATM
en: In AEON malls & Ministop — foreign-card friendly, often fee-free.
de: In AEON-Malls & Ministop — kartenfreundlich, oft gebührenfrei.

name: Coin lockers — Tokyo Station
en: Large coin-locker banks; pay by IC card. Fill up fast at peak times.
de: Große Schließfachanlagen; Zahlung per IC-Karte. Zu Stoßzeiten schnell voll.

name: Coin lockers — Shinjuku Station
en: Lockers throughout Shinjuku Station; IC-card payment.
de: Schließfächer in der ganzen Shinjuku-Station; IC-Karten-Zahlung.

name: Coin lockers — Kyoto Station
en: Big locker area near the central gate.

name: Yamato luggage forwarding — Narita
en: Takkyubin counter: send bags airport → hotel (usually next day).
de: Takkyubin-Schalter: Gepäck Flughafen → Hotel senden (meist am nächsten Tag).

name: Yamato luggage forwarding — Kansai Airport
en: Forward bags KIX → hotel so you travel light.
de: Gepäck KIX → Hotel senden, um leicht zu reisen.

name: Don Quijote Shibuya (24h)
en: 24-hour discount + drugstore, tax-free, everything under one roof.
de: 24h Discount + Drogerie, Tax-Free, alles unter einem Dach.

name: Matsumoto Kiyoshi
en: Drugstore chain — meds, cosmetics, tax-free; branches everywhere.
de: Drogerie-Kette — Medikamente, Kosmetik, Tax-Free; überall Filialen.

name: 7-Eleven
en: 7-Bank ATM (foreign cards), pay bills/tickets, onigiri & oden, free Wi-Fi.

name: FamilyMart
en: Famichiki fried chicken, Famima ATM, ticket machine, hot snacks.

name: Lawson
en: Karaage-kun, Loppi ticket kiosk, Uchi Café sweets, Natural Lawson.

name: Free Wi-Fi
en: Konbini, stations and many cafés offer free Wi-Fi; the 'Japan Wi-Fi auto-connect' app links many spots.
de: Konbini, Bahnhöfe und viele Cafés bieten Gratis-WLAN; die App 'Japan Wi-Fi auto-connect' verbindet viele Spots.
